nasb.text: nor did they show kindness to the household of Jerubbaal (that is, Gideon) in accord with all the good that he had done to Israel.

esv.text: and they did not show steadfast love to the family of Jerubbaal (that is, Gideon) in return for all the good that he had done to Israel.

cnv.text: 也沒有照著基甸向以色列人所施的一切恩惠，恩待耶路．巴力，就是基甸的家。

ccb.text: 也没有因耶路·巴力——基甸的功绩而厚待他的家人。
